videos.headline: Josh Hoover calls his own number for TCU TD
videos.description: Josh Hoover scores to give the Horned Frogs a two-possession lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Josh Hoover crosses goal line for 1-yard rushing touchdown) 2024/10/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Money Parks takes off for 71-yard Utah TD
videos.description: Money Parks reaches out for the incredible 71-yard touchdown as Utah finally gets on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Money Parks takes off for 71-yard Utah TD) 2024/10/20 ESHEET
